svg.title: HCM City Traffic Camera Data Flow Diagram
svg.desc: Data flow from traffic cameras through YOLO processing, MinIO, PostgreSQL, FIWARE Orion, to frontend dashboard via Socket.IO
svg.title: F-02 Forecast Generation Flow — image-predict service
svg.desc: Data flow from pod startup through model loading, scheduler, RF prediction, DB writes, MV refresh, FIWARE upsert to frontend
svg.title: F-03 Sync Actual Values Flow — sync-actual CronJob
svg.desc: CronJob runs at :03 :08 :13… offset 3 min after F-02, performs a single UPDATE joining camera_detections to camera_forecasts to fill actual_value and error_value
svg.title: F-04 Model Performance Evaluation Flow — model-performance CronJob
svg.desc: Daily CronJob at 07:00 UTC queries camera_forecasts, computes MAE/MAPE across 6 dimensions, saves to model_metrics_history, then upserts to FIWARE for frontend analytics

g.text: actual_value IS NOT NULL — 7 ngày gần nhất
